sentences.sentence: Nearly all of us know what it's like to be put on 'musical hold'.
sentences.translation: 我们几乎都体验过电话接通后被置于“音乐等待”状态是什么滋味。

structure.text: what it's like to be put on 'musical hold'

difficult_points: what it's like 是名词性从句，表示“这种体验是什么样”。
to be put on hold 是被动不定式，表示被要求在线等待。

sentences.sentence: Call almost any customer service number, and you can expect to hear at least a few bars of boring elevator music before an operator picks up.
sentences.translation: 拨打几乎任何客服电话，你都可能在接线员接听前先听上至少几小节乏味的背景音乐。

structure.text: Call almost any customer service number
and you can expect to hear at least a few bars of boring elevator music

difficult_points: 祈使句 + and + 陈述句表示“只要……就会……”。
picks up 省略宾语 the phone，指接线员接听电话。

sentences.sentence: The question is: do you hang up or do you keep holding?
sentences.translation: 问题是：你会挂断电话，还是继续等待？

structure.text: do you hang up or do you keep holding

difficult_points: 冒号后的选择疑问句具体说明 The question 的内容。
hang up 与 keep holding 构成两个相反选择。

sentences.sentence: That may depend on your gender and what type of music is playing, according to research reported by University of Cincinnati Associate Professor of Marketing, James Kellaris.
sentences.translation: 辛辛那提大学市场营销学副教授詹姆斯·凯拉里斯所报告的研究表明，这可能取决于你的性别以及当时播放的音乐类型。

structure.text: may depend on your gender and what type of music is playing
according to research reported by University of Cincinnati Associate Professor of Marketing, James Kellaris

difficult_points: That 指上一句中“挂断还是继续等待”的选择。
what type of music is playing 是名词性从句，与 your gender 并列作 depend on 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Kellaris, who has studied the effects of music on consumers for more than 12 years, teamed with Sigma Research Management Group to evaluate the effects of 'hold music' for a company that operates a customer service line.
sentences.translation: 凯拉里斯研究音乐对消费者的影响已有十二年多；他与 Sigma Research Management Group 合作，为一家经营客服热线的公司评估“等待音乐”的影响。

structure.text: Kellaris, who has studied the effects of music on consumers for more than 12 years
teamed with Sigma Research Management Group
to evaluate the effects of 'hold music' for a company that operates a customer service line

difficult_points: who 引导非限制性定语从句，补充 Kellaris 的研究经历。
to evaluate 表示合作目的；that operates ... 修饰 company。

sentences.sentence: The researchers tested four types of 'on-hold' music with 71 of the company's clients, 30 of them women.
sentences.translation: 研究人员让该公司的 71 名客户测试了四类“等待音乐”，其中 30 人是女性。

structure.text: tested four types of 'on-hold' music with 71 of the company's clients

difficult_points: with 71 ... 说明测试对象，而不是测试工具。
30 of them women 是省略 being 的独立结构，补充样本性别构成。

sentences.sentence: Light jazz, classical, rock and the company's current format of adult alternative (a mix of contemporary styles) were all tested.
sentences.translation: 轻爵士、古典乐、摇滚乐，以及公司当前采用的成人另类音乐（多种当代风格的混合）都接受了测试。

structure.text: Light jazz, classical, rock and the company's current format of adult alternative (a mix of contemporary styles)

difficult_points: 四种音乐类型构成长并列主语。
a mix of contemporary styles 是 adult alternative 的括号同位解释。

sentences.sentence: The sample included individual consumers, small business and large business segments.
sentences.translation: 样本包括个人消费者、小型企业和大型企业群体。

structure.text: individual consumers, small business and large business segments

difficult_points: sample 指参与研究的客户样本。
small business and large business segments 表示按企业规模划分的客户群体。

sentences.sentence: Participants were asked to imagine calling a customer assistance line and being placed on hold.
sentences.translation: 参与者被要求想象自己拨打客服热线并被置于等待状态。

structure.text: to imagine calling a customer assistance line and being placed on hold

difficult_points: were asked to 是被动结构，表示实验指令。
calling 与 being placed 是并列动名词，共同作 imagine 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: They were then exposed to 'on-hold' music via headsets and asked to estimate how long it played.
sentences.translation: 随后，他们通过耳机听取“等待音乐”，并被要求估计音乐播放了多久。

structure.text: were then exposed to 'on-hold' music via headsets
and asked to estimate how long it played

difficult_points: asked 前省略与前半句共用的 were。
how long it played 是 estimate 的宾语从句，it 指 on-hold music。

sentences.sentence: Their reactions and comments were also solicited and quantified by the researchers.
sentences.translation: 研究人员还征集了他们的反应和评论，并将其量化。
difficult_points: solicited 与 quantified 是两个并列的过去分词，共同构成被动谓语。
Their 指实验参与者。

sentences.sentence: Service providers, of course don't want you to have to wait on hold, but if you do, they want it to be a pleasant experience for you.
sentences.translation: 服务提供商当然不希望你不得不在线等待；但如果确实要等，他们希望这对你来说是一次愉快的体验。

structure.text: Service providers, of course don't want you to have to wait on hold
they want it to be a pleasant experience for you

difficult_points: if you do 中 do 替代 have to wait on hold。
want it to be ... 是 want + 宾语 + 不定式补语；of course 前缺少配对逗号是原文标点问题。

sentences.sentence: But Kellaris' conclusions may hold some distressing news for companies.
sentences.translation: 但凯拉里斯的结论对企业来说可能包含一些令人不安的消息。

structure.text: may hold some distressing news for companies

difficult_points: But 将企业希望与实际研究结果形成转折。
hold news 在这里表示“包含、带来消息”，不是握住。

sentences.sentence: No matter what music was played, the time spent 'on hold' was generally overestimated.
sentences.translation: 无论播放什么音乐，人们通常都会高估自己在线等待的时间。

structure.text: No matter what music was played

difficult_points: No matter what 引导让步从句，表示音乐类型不改变总体结果。
spent 'on hold' 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 time。

sentences.sentence: The actual wait in the study was 6 minutes, but the average estimate was 7 minutes and 6 seconds.
sentences.translation: 研究中的实际等待时间是 6 分钟，但参与者的平均估计为 7 分 6 秒。

structure.text: The actual wait in the study was 6 minutes
but the average estimate was 7 minutes and 6 seconds

difficult_points: but 对比实际时间和主观估计。
average estimate 指所有参与者估计值的平均数。

sentences.sentence: He did find some good news for the client who hired him.
sentences.translation: 不过，他确实也为聘请他的客户发现了一些好消息。

structure.text: did find some good news for the client

difficult_points: did + 动词原形用于强调，表示“确实发现了”。
who hired him 是定语从句，修饰 client。

sentences.sentence: The kind of music they're playing now, alternative, is probably their best choice.
sentences.translation: 他们目前播放的另类音乐，可能正是最合适的选择。

structure.text: The kind of music they're playing now, alternative

difficult_points: they're playing now 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 music。
alternative 是对 The kind of music 的同位说明。

sentences.sentence: Two things made it a good choice.
sentences.translation: 有两个原因使它成为不错的选择。
difficult_points: it 指上一句的 alternative music。
made it a good choice 是 make + 宾语 + 名词补语结构。

sentences.sentence: First, it did not produce significantly more positive or negative reactions in people.
sentences.translation: 第一，它不会让人产生明显更多的正面或负面反应。

structure.text: did not produce significantly more positive or negative reactions in people

difficult_points: it 仍指 alternative music。
significantly 修饰 more，强调差异在统计或程度上并不显著。

sentences.sentence: Second, males and females were less polarised in their reactions to this type of music.
sentences.translation: 第二，男性和女性对这类音乐的反应分歧较小。

structure.text: were less polarised in their reactions to this type of music

difficult_points: less polarised 表示两个群体的反应不像对其他音乐那样两极分化。
to this type of music 修饰 reactions，说明反应对象。

sentences.sentence: Kellaris' other findings, however, make the state of musical hold a little less firm: time spent 'on hold' seemed slightly shorter when light jazz was played, but the effect of music format differed for men and women.
sentences.translation: 然而，凯拉里斯的其他发现让“音乐等待”该采用什么形式变得不那么确定：播放轻爵士时，等待时间似乎略短，但不同音乐形式对男性和女性的影响并不相同。

structure.text: Kellaris' other findings, however, make the state of musical hold a little less firm
time spent 'on hold' seemed slightly shorter when light jazz was played
but the effect of music format differed for men and women

difficult_points: 冒号后两个分句解释为何结论不够确定。
spent 'on hold' 修饰 time；when 从句使用被动语态说明播放的音乐类型。

expressions.meaning_zh: 对男性和女性有所不同

sentences.sentence: Among the males, the wait seemed shortest when classical music was played.
sentences.translation: 在男性中，播放古典音乐时，等待时间似乎最短。
difficult_points: Among the males 限定这一结论只适用于男性组。
seemed shortest 是系动词加最高级表语，描述主观感受。

sentences.sentence: Among the females, the wait seemed longest when classical music was played.
sentences.translation: 而在女性中，播放古典音乐时，等待时间似乎最长。
difficult_points: 本句与上一句结构平行，突出男女反应相反。
when classical music was played 是被动时间从句。

sentences.sentence: This may be related to differences in attention levels and musical preferences.
sentences.translation: 这可能与注意力水平和音乐偏好的差异有关。

structure.text: differences in attention levels and musical preferences

difficult_points: This 指男女对古典音乐等待时长感受相反这一现象。
differences in 的宾语是两个并列名词短语。

sentences.sentence: In general, classical music evoked the most positive reactions among males; light jazz evoked the most positive reactions (and shortest waiting time estimates) among females.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，古典音乐在男性中引发的正面反应最多；轻爵士则在女性中引发的正面反应最多，而且她们估计的等待时间最短。

structure.text: In general, classical music evoked the most positive reactions among males
light jazz evoked the most positive reactions (and shortest waiting time estimates) among females

difficult_points: 分号连接结构平行、对象不同的两个独立分句。
括号内容补充说明女性对轻爵士的等待时间估计也最短。

sentences.sentence: Rock was the least preferred across both gender groups and produced the longest waiting time estimates.'The rock music's driving beat kind of aggravates people calling customer assistance with a problem,' said Kellaris.
sentences.translation: 摇滚乐在男女两组中都是最不受欢迎的，并让人产生最长的等待时间估计。“摇滚乐强劲的节拍多少会让那些因遇到问题而拨打客服的人更加烦躁，”凯拉里斯说。

structure.text: Rock was the least preferred across both gender groups and produced the longest waiting time estimates
The rock music's driving beat kind of aggravates people calling customer assistance with a problem

difficult_points: estimates. 与开引号之间缺少空格，导致两句话粘连；为保证原文回拼保留在同一条。
calling customer assistance with a problem 是现在分词短语，修饰 people；kind of 表示程度上的缓和。

sentences.sentence: 'The more positive the reaction to the music, the shorter the waiting time seemed to be.
sentences.translation: “人们对音乐的反应越积极，感觉等待的时间就越短。

structure.text: The more positive the reaction to the music
the shorter the waiting time seemed to be

difficult_points: the more ..., the shorter ... 是“越……越……”的关联比较结构。
本句的开引号在下一句末尾才闭合，属于跨句连续引语。

sentences.sentence: So may be time does tend to fly when you're having fun, even if you're on musical hold,' Kellaris joked.
sentences.translation: 所以，也许人在开心时确实会觉得时间飞逝，即使是在伴着音乐等待接听，”凯拉里斯开玩笑说。

structure.text: So may be time does tend to fly
even if you're on musical hold

difficult_points: does tend 用助动词 does 强调“确实往往如此”。
may be 在此语义上应为副词 maybe，但原文分写；even if 引导让步从句。

sentences.sentence: But unfortunately for companies operating on-hold lines, men and women have different ideas about what music is 'fun'.
sentences.translation: 但不幸的是，对于运营电话等待线路的公司来说，男性和女性对什么音乐算“有趣”看法不同。

structure.text: But unfortunately for companies operating on-hold lines
have different ideas about what music is 'fun'

difficult_points: operating on-hold lines 是现在分词短语，修饰 companies。
what music is 'fun' 是 about 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: 'The possible solution,' Kellaris joked, 'might be for the recorded message to say: if you're a male, please press one; if you're a female, please press two.
sentences.translation: “一个可能的解决办法，”凯拉里斯开玩笑说，“或许是让录音提示这样说：如果你是男性，请按 1；如果你是女性，请按 2。

structure.text: might be for the recorded message to say

difficult_points: Kellaris joked 插入引语中间，主干是 The possible solution might be ...。
for the recorded message to say 是不定式复合结构作表语；开引号延续至下一句。

sentences.sentence: If you are in a bad mood, please hang up and try later.'
sentences.translation: 如果你心情不好，请挂断电话，稍后再试。”

structure.text: If you are in a bad mood
please hang up and try later

difficult_points: If 从句提出条件，主句是带 please 的礼貌祈使句。
hang up 与 try 是并列祈使谓语；句末引号闭合上一句开始的引语。
